name: agentic-remotion-pipeline
description: An opinionated, agent-drivable Remotion project scaffold: structured JSON in, a loudness-normalized MP4 out. input/ -> build-props -> render (silent) -> mix -> final/.

scripts.render: npm run build:props && remotion render remotion/src/index.ts VideoFromPlan render/out.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18 --props=render/props.json
scripts.all: npm run render && npm run mix
scripts.preview: npm run build:props && remotion studio remotion/src/index.ts
scripts.still: npm run build:props && remotion still remotion/src/index.ts VideoFromPlan render/still.png --frame=30 --props=render/props.json
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run doctor
